details.test: Task 1: Save cheapest LA-Tokyo air freight quote (<=5 days)
Task 2: Book domestic pickup Chicago -> New York (<=3 days, <=$800)
Task 3: Change delivery address & date for in-transit shipment (same city)
Task 4: Select cheapest FCL container (>=28 m³, <$3000)
Task 5: Multi-package Miami -> Dallas, cheapest ground with morning delivery
Task 6: Lithium battery rules to Canada & submit dangerous goods inquiry
Task 7: Address book add two addresses & set default pickup
Task 8: Refrigerated Paris -> Rome, earliest delivery under $2500
Task 9: Recurring weekly pickup every Tuesday 3 PM for 3 months
